content:
# Session 82 (iter-082) ‚ÄĒ review

## Metadata
- Sorry count: **3 ‚Üí 3 (FLAT)**. `TensorObjInverse.lean` {S3 `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat`
  L1324, S4a `dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` L1360, telescope `trivialisation_restrict_compat`
  L2128}. PresheafDualPullback.lean 0; SliceTransport.lean 0.
- `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.TensorObjInverse` ‚Üí **EXIT 0 (8325 jobs)**, green-mod-sorry,
  no errors. (The build's "L2059 declaration uses sorry" is the telescope DECLARATION line; its
  `sorry` token is L2128.) sync_leanok iter-082 (sha 1dc90be, +0/‚ąí0). doctor CLEAN.
- SOLO `prove`, one `.lean` file edited (+ MEMORY.md). Targets: S3 only (S4a/telescope NOT attempted
  per trip-wire).

## Target analysis ‚ÄĒ S3 `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` (the only attempted target)

The iter-082 plan dispatched a "de-risked terminal close" of S3's collapsed residual `‚ėÖpb-iso`
under a HARD trip-wire (close-or-STOP). It did NOT close. What happened, in order:

- **Attempt 1 (failed) ‚ÄĒ STEP-1 collapse via the recipe-pinned `iso_symm_trans_cancel`.**
  `rw [iso_symm_trans_cancel]` ‚Üí "did not find pattern". The two `RFIP_j` occurrences are
  syntactically different (one bare, one under the c.1 pushforward/restrict defeq seam); keyed `rw`
  can't unify them.
- **Attempt 2 (SUCCESS, lake-verified) ‚ÄĒ STEP-1 collapse via NEW helper `iso_symm_fold_cancel`.**
  Keep `dual_restrict_iso j (M|U)` FOLDED so the 2nd `RFIP_j` is never spelled out; cancel
  `a.symm ‚Č™‚Čę D ‚Č™‚Čę h = g ‚Č™‚Čę h` from `hD : D = a ‚Č™‚Čę g`, `subst hD` in the abstract `[Category C]`
  body before any seam is in play. `rw [iso_symm_fold_cancel _ _ _ (dual_restrict_iso_eq_comparison
  j (M.restrict U.őĻ)) (dualIsoOfIso (restrictCompReindex j hjőĻ M))]`. STEP-1 collapse LANDED. The S3
  sorry now sits at the fully-collapsed `‚ėÖpb-iso` (the `RFIP_j.symm ‚Č™‚Čę RFIP_j` pair is gone).
- **Attempt 3 (FAILED ‚ÄĒ provably impossible, lake-verified negative) ‚ÄĒ STEP-2 typed
  `dualComparison_pullbackCongr`.** State the recipe's "subst-style dual mirror of
  `pullbackTensorMap_pullbackCongr`": `(pullbackCongr hf).app M.dual ‚Č™‚Čę C_g M = C_f M ‚Č™‚Čę
  dualIsoOfIso ((restrictFunctorCongr hf).app M).symm` with `C_f M := SCP_f(M.val.dual) ‚Č™‚Čę
  sheafify őł_{f,M}`. **Fails at STATEMENT elaboration even with a `sorry` body.** `C_f M`'s codomain
  is `sheafify(presheaf-pushforward-dual)`, defeq to the Scheme-level `dual` ONLY through c.1
  (`pushforwardObjValRestrictIso = Iso.refl`); unifying the two `sheafify(‚Ä¶)` forces whnf INTO the
  sheafification colimit ‚áí **infinite whnf**. `maxHeartbeats 12_800_000` + `set_option
  backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false` BOTH fail (`lake env lean`, not LSP). DEAD: **any typed
  coherence whose transport is a Scheme-`dualIsoOfIso` adjacent to an unfolded `SCP/őł` leg.** This is
  the same colimit seam that bans `rw`/`simp` of category lemmas across `SheafOfModules ‚Čę`.
- **Attempt 4 (SUCCESS, lake-verified, axiom-clean) ‚ÄĒ FOLDED brick
  `dual_restrict_iso_pullbackCongr` (L1211).** State the SAME coherence at the FOLDED
  `dual_restrict_iso` level (both junctions Scheme-`dual` ‚ÜĒ Scheme-`dual`, syntactic, NO sheafify
  whnf): `(restrictFunctorCongr hf).app M.dual ‚Č™‚Čę dual_restrict_iso g M = dual_restrict_iso f M ‚Č™‚Čę
  dualIsoOfIso ((restrictFunctorCongr hf).app M).symm`. Proof: `subst hf`; `(restrictFunctorCongr
  rfl).app ¬∑ = Iso.refl` (section-level `ext U : 3 <;> simp` via `rfl`-valued
  `restrictFunctorCongr_hom_app_app`); `dualIsoOfIso_refl`; `refl_trans`/`trans_refl`. Compiles, but
  **currently DEAD (0 call sites)** ‚ÄĒ it uses `restrictFunctorCongr` (restrict world) while the
  collapsed goal's reindex is `pullbackCongr` (pullback world), so to USE it S3 must be reworked to
  stay in folded restrict-world.

### Exact residual at the S3 sorry (L1324) ‚ÄĒ the collapsed `‚ėÖpb-iso`
```
‚äĘ (pullbackComp j U.őĻ).app M.dual ‚Č™‚Čę (pullbackCongr hjőĻ).app M.dual ‚Č™‚Čę
    SCP_{V.őĻ}(M.val.dual) ‚Č™‚Čę sheafify(őł_{V.őĻ,M})
  = (pullback j).mapIso (SCP_{U.őĻ}(M.val.dual) ‚Č™‚Čę sheafify(őł_{U.őĻ,M})) ‚Č™‚Čę
      (SCP_j((M|U).val.dual) ‚Č™‚Čę sheafify(őł_{j,M|U})) ‚Č™‚Čę dualIsoOfIso (restrictCompReindex j hjőĻ M)
```
(`SCP_f := SheafOfModules.sheafificationCompPullback (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f) |>.app`;
`őł_{f,M} := (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (ūĚüô _)).mapIso (presheafDualPullbackComparison f M)`.)

## Key findings / patterns
- **Negative knowledge is the real product of iter-082** (and it is genuine, lake-proven): the
  STEP-2 "typed subst-style `pullbackCongr` coherence" pinned by the iter-081/082 plans is
  UN-TYPABLE. This kills the planner's pinned route and forces a structural rework. It is exactly the
  iter-081 `iter-082 NOTE`-superseding situation: the realized finish ‚Č† the pinned recipe.
- **`iso_symm_fold_cancel` pattern (reusable):** to cancel `a.symm ‚Č™‚Čę (‚Ä¶a‚Ä¶) ‚Č™‚Čę h` across a defeq
  seam, keep the middle factor FOLDED and pass its defining equation `hD : D = a ‚Č™‚Čę g`, then `subst`
  in the abstract `[Category C]` body ‚ÄĒ beats the keyed `iso_symm_trans_cancel` which the seam
  defeats.
- **Folded-vs-unfolded world is THE design axis for S3.** A coherence is typable iff both its
  junctions are folded Scheme-`dual` (syntactic). The moment a `dualIsoOfIso` sits next to an
  UNFOLDED `SCP/őł` leg the sheafify-colimit whnf is infinite. ‚áí the S3 close must do ALL
  reindex/transport algebra at the folded level and unfold to bridges (b)/(c)/c.1 only at the very
  end.

## Convergence read (review's own assessment ‚ÄĒ NOT a plan-phase verdict)
- **Borderline CHURNING.** Sorry count is FLAT for 2 consecutive iters (081, 082) on S3, and the
  iter-082 plan's "de-risked close" produced 2 verified bricks + a hard negative, but the *route
  itself was partly invalidated*: the early RFIP-cancel-into-pullback-world steps must now be
  replaced. The iter-082 plan's own HARD WATCH ("3rd consecutive PARTIAL ‚áí mandatory CHURNING") is
  triggered. **The corrective is NOT another monolithic prove round** ‚ÄĒ it is an EFFORT-BREAK of S3
  into the folded-cocycle reduction (route 1), which is the structural change the stuck-protocol
  requires before a retry. See recommendations.md.
- Both review subagents confirm the iter-082 code is real and Lean-faithful (0 must-fix, 0
  critical/major from the auditor). The concern is convergence, not correctness.

## Review subagents
- **lean-auditor** `iter082`: 0 critical / 0 major / 2 minor ‚ÄĒ `task_results/lean-auditor-iter082.md`.
  `iso_symm_fold_cancel` genuine/live/axiom-clean; `dual_restrict_iso_pullbackCongr` sound but
  currently DEAD (0 call sites; activates when L1324 discharges); DESIGN NOTE L1166 accurate, no
  orphaned `set_option`; S3 reduction = 9 real tactic steps; 3 sorries genuine. Minor: dual
  iter-numbering in docstrings (iter-206/225/226 ‚ÄĒ cross-project convention).
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `tensorobjinverse-iter082`: **0 must-fix** / 1 major / 2 minor ‚ÄĒ
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-tensorobjinverse-iter082.md`. 3 active targets faithful
  term-for-term, markers consistent (3 statement `\leanok`, 3 proof blocks correctly without). Major:
  coverage debt ‚ÄĒ `dual_restrict_iso_pullbackCongr` (substantive dual-mirror brick) un-blueprinted.
  Minors: `iso_symm_fold_cancel` + 4 siblings un-blueprinted; Lean docstring L1223 cites a
  non-existent label `lem:dual_restrict_iso_dualisoofiso_restrict_compat` (real:
  `lem:dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat`).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` proof (~L8437): added an
  iter-082 `% NOTE` refining the iter-081 NOTE ‚ÄĒ records STEP-1 collapse landed
  (`iso_symm_fold_cancel`), the typed Scheme-`dualIsoOfIso` STEP-2 coherence PROVEN IMPOSSIBLE
  (infinite-whnf sheafify-colimit seam, 12.8M HB + transparency both fail), the realized folded brick
  `dual_restrict_iso_pullbackCongr`, and the FINISH = folded-world rework (effort-break, NOT a
  monolithic close). No `\leanok` override (sync consistent with 3 open sorries). The docstring
  mislabel (L1223) is in a `.lean` file ‚ÄĒ review can't edit it; logged for the prover/refactor.

## Recommendations
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: EFFORT-BREAK S3 into the folded-cocycle reduction; do NOT
re-dispatch a monolithic `‚ėÖpb-iso` close.
